SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium.driver

Class AppiumDriver

java.lang.Object
ai.alumnium.driver.BaseDriver
ai.alumnium.driver.AppiumDriver
public final class AppiumDriver extends BaseDriver
Appium (mobile) implementation of BaseDriver.

Switches between the NATIVE_APP and a web-view context when gathering source vs. querying title/URL. Tools unsupported on mobile (e.g. tab switching, drag slider) throw UnsupportedOperationException.
